# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### ELEGOO Raises USD Tens of Millions in B+ Round Backed by Meituan and DJI

- Category: chinese-ai

- Summary: Consumer 3D printing firm ELEGOO has raised tens of millions of USD in a B+ round from investors including DJIGlobal and Meituan, aiming to close the gap with market leaders as its 2025 revenue surpasses $320 million USD.

### NASN Automotive Electronics Receives Approval for Hong Kong Listing
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai

- Summary: NASN Automotive Electronics, a Chinese specialist in by-wire chassis systems, has received regulatory clearance for its planned Hong Kong IPO, positioning it as a potential frontrunner in the autonomous driving supply chain.

### ShadowAI Raises USD 14 Million for 3D World Models
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/shadow-ai-raises-usd-14-million-for-3-d-world-models
- Summary: Embodied AI startup ShadowAI has secured nearly $14 million USD in cumulative early-stage funding to advance its native 3D dynamic world model, which enables low-cost real-time spatial data capture for flexible manufacturing robots.

### FAIRLAND Files for Hong Kong IPO, Reports USD 140 Million Revenue
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/fairland-files-for-hong-kong-ipo-reports-usd-140-million-revenue
- Summary: FAIRLAND Group, China's largest smart pool equipment supplier, has filed for a Hong Kong IPO after reporting a 33.1% revenue jump to $140 million USD in 2025, despite swinging to a net loss amid heavy D2C expansion.

### Alibaba Releases Qwen3.6-Max-Preview

- Summary: Alibaba has unveiled Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, the latest and most capable model in its Qwen series, demonstrating enhanced performance in agentic coding, world knowledge, and instruction following.

- Summary: Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) provides distribution-free prediction intervals with asymptotic coverage guarantees for time series under distribution shift.
